data.title: Healthcare company GRAIL, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRAL) to release 2025 financial results post-market close on Feb. 16, 2026.
data.description: Today, in Menlo Park, California, GRAIL, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRAL), a healthcare firm dedicated to early cancer detection for successful treatment, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year of 2025 after the market closes on February 16, 2026.

data.title: Voyager (NYSE: VOYG) partners with ATMOS for increased access to space; simplifying process for scientific discovery.
data.description: In Denver, Voyager Technologies (NYSE: VOYG) has revealed a new collaboration with ATMOS Space Cargo, a top supplier of orbital cargo and return services. This partnership aims to enhance access to space for scientific exploration and technological progress. President of Space, Defense, and National Security at Voyager, Matt Magaña, emphasized the importance of streamlining the process for customers, stating that they shouldn't need multiple vendors to reach space. This initiative reflects a joint commitment to making space accessible.

data.title: TaskUs, Inc. (Nasdaq: TASK) will report Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026, post-market close. Responsible for digital services.
data.description: TaskUs, Inc., a prominent provider of outsourced digital services and cutting-edge customer experience solutions to top global companies, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, after the U.S. market closes. The comprehensive earnings report and additional financial information will be accessible on the Investor Relations page of the company’s website at https://ir.taskus.com. TaskUs is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TASK.

data.title: Westlake Royal Building Products launches new website with Design Canvas™ tool for exterior projects visualization.
data.description: In Houston, Westlake Royal Building Products™, a subsidiary of Westlake company (NYSE: WLK), unveiled a revamped website consolidating all product brands into one platform. The updated site features Design Canvas™, a user-friendly tool for planning and visualizing exterior projects. This move aims to provide a seamless digital experience for homeowners, designers, and building professionals.

data.title: DeciBio Consulting LLC releases Europe Oncology Genomics Tracker with insights from 100+ oncologists in EU-5 countries.
data.description: In Los Angeles, a survey conducted by DeciBio Consulting LLC focused on the EU-5 countries (France, Germany, Italy, Spain, and the United Kingdom) provides insights into the adoption and utilization of genomics technologies in the region's solid tumor oncology markets. The study, which surveyed over 100 medical oncologists, offers a comprehensive view of current trends, challenges, and areas of growth. The Europe Oncology Genomics Tracker aims to track how genomics technologies are being assessed and implemented, offering valuable data on this rapidly evolving field.

data.title: Zeeco, Inc. acquires Japan-based Applicot Corporation, strengthening global presence in advanced combustion industry.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma on February 16, 2026, Zeeco, a prominent company specializing in advanced combustion and environmental solutions, revealed the acquisition of Applicot Corporation, a top combustion company based in Japan. This acquisition is anticipated to enhance Zeeco's presence in the Japanese market as it continues to expand its global reach.

data.title: Co-PSMA trial finds Cu-64 SAR-bisPSMA doubles prostate cancer detection vs. Ga-68 PSMA-11. Presented at European Urology conf.
data.description: An abstract summarizing key discoveries from the Co-PSMA Investigator-Initiated Trial (IIT) has been unveiled. The research was helmed by Prof Louise Emmett from St Vincent's Hospital Sydney. The abstract has been selected for oral presentation at the forthcoming European Association of Urology conference.

data.title: New data at SABCS 2025 shows EAI helps identify postmenopausal HR+ HER2-negative breast cancer patients for extended therapy.
data.description: In Houston on February 16, 2026, fresh findings were revealed at the 2025 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium (SABCS) regarding the NRG/NSABP B-42 trial. The data showcased the effectiveness of the Endocrine Activity Index (EAI) in pinpointing postmenopausal women with hormone receptor-positive (HR+), HER2-negative breast cancer.

data.title: Story about a pastor and his dog, illustrating God's support. Book: High Desert Pastor: Pepper the Australian Shepherd, priced at $24.49.
data.description: Xulon Press introduces a work of fiction centered around a pastor and his loyal canine companion. Located in COCHISE, Arizona, the book by Author David Boyer explores the concept of divine assistance arriving in surprising forms, titled "High Desert Pastor: Pepper the Australian Shepherd." Released on February 16, 2026, the book is available for purchase in paperback format at the price of $24.49.

data.title: Approval granted for major electric transmission project in central Ohio to enhance grid capacity and reliability. PJM Interconnection selects $573 million project.
data.description: A significant electric transmission project has been chosen by regional grid operator PJM Interconnection to address critical infrastructure requirements in central Ohio. The project aims to improve grid capacity and reliability in the rapidly expanding greater Columbus region. This decision was made in Akron, Ohio, on February 16, 2026. The initiative is expected to bolster the grid's capabilities and ensure reliable electricity supply, benefiting the growing population in central Ohio.

data.title: Chiquita partners with artist Jiaqi Wang for third year of Pop by Nature campaign, bringing fresh creativity to fruit.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on February 16, 2026, the renowned fruit company Chiquita has unveiled the third edition of its seasonal creative campaign, Pop by Nature. This year, the campaign features a vibrant infusion of color, creativity, and personality. Partnering with artist Jiaqi Wang, the new campaign aims to bring a fresh perspective to the world's most recognizable fruit.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures up on Presidents Day, S&P 500 and Nasdaq below 50-day lines. Tech giants like Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, Nvidia in focus.
data.description: Futures saw an increase while U.S. markets were shut for Presidents Day. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are currently trading below their 50-day averages. However, certain tech giants such as Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia are influencing an underlying strength in the market. Dow Jones Futures have surged in this context.

data.title: Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium upgrades with self-driving network by HPE for better fan experience. Major tech overhaul for 2 seasons brings digitalization to sports infrastructures in Europe.
data.description: In Madrid, the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium, the home of Atlético de Madrid, is upgrading its technology with a cutting-edge self-driving network infrastructure using HPE Networking solutions. The initiative, spanning two phases across the 2025/26 and 2026/27 seasons, aims to revamp the stadium's communication system, signaling a significant step in the digital transformation of sports facilities in Europe. This modernization project is poised to elevate the stadium's tech capabilities as it embraces a new era of sports infrastructure digitization.

data.title: Cloudvirga partners with Optimal Blue to offer real-time pricing info in their Loan Hub, aiding in quicker loan processing.
data.description: Cloudvirga, a company based in Irvine, California, and owned by Stewart, has revealed a new partnership with Optimal Blue's product and pricing engine (PPE). This integration allows for real-time access to pricing and eligibility information within Cloudvirga's Loan Hub platform. Users can now generate pricing scenarios for consumers at the early stage of a loan application as well as during the processing of an active loan. The Loan Hub serves as a centralized tool for origination teams to oversee pipelines, engage with borrowers, and collaborate effectively. This advancement streamlines the loan origination process and enhances customer experience.

data.title: Children's Milestone expands in-home ABA therapy services across VA, MD, and D.C. to assist families during spring IEP season.
data.description: Children's Milestone, a top provider of in-home Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) therapy, is increasing its clinical capacity in Virginia, Maryland, and Washington, D.C. as spring approaches. The expansion aims to cater to growing demand for therapy services in the region. This move is part of the company's strategic plan to enhance services and reach more families in need.

data.title: Hawaiian Bros opens first Glenwood, IL location, expanding Chicagoland reach. Fast-growing chain aims to bring island-inspired cuisine to more customers.
data.description: Popular island-themed dining establishment, Hawaiian Bros, is extending its "Ohana" to Glenwood, Illinois, marking its inaugural island-inspired site in the area. The opening, which occurred on February 16, 2026, signifies the chain's expansion within the Chicagoland region. Known for its rapid growth, Hawaiian Bros continues its success by introducing its unique dining experience to a new community.
